---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for darnlink
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that darnlink doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Scope note**
darnlink deliberately does *one* thing — keep Markdown links robust via UUIDs (repair + robustify).
It has no entity model, issue tracking, or document semantics (see the constitution in `.specify/`).
Requests that expand that scope are likely out of scope by design — but edge cases and ergonomics
around the two operations are very welcome.
